zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd於大約1340年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，他的父親Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn37歲，母親Mabli II ferch Philip18歲。他於1384年與Arddun ferch Ieuan結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1390年之後在威爾士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd于大约1340年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，他的父亲Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn37岁，母亲Mabli II ferch Philip18岁。他于1384年与Arddun ferch Ieuan结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1390年之后在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Gruffud
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd was born about 1340, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn, was 37 and his mother, Mabli II ferch Philip, was 18. He married Arddun ferch Ieuan in 1384. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1390, in Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd est né environ 1340, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mabli II ferch Philip, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Arddun ferch Ieuan en 1384. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1390, à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd um 1340 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn 37 und seine Mutter Mabli II ferch Philip 18. Er hat 1384 Arddun ferch Ieuan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1390 in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd è nato il circa 1340 nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mabli II ferch Philip, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Arddun ferch Ieuan nel 1384. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1390, nel Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwydが約1340年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで生まれた時，父Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarnは37歳，母Mabli II ferch Philipは18歳であった。1384年にArddun ferch Ieuanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1390年以後にウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabli II ferch Philip(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1384년 Arddun ferch Ieuan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1390년 이후 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mabli II ferch Philip, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Arddun ferch Ieuan em 1384. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1390, em Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd родился около 1340 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabli II ferch Philip, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Arddun ferch Ieuan в 1384 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1390 г. в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffudd ap Ieuan Llwyd nació aproximadamente 1340, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mabli II ferch Philip, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Arddun ferch Ieuan en 1384. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1390, en Gales.
